name: 04_vwap_pullback_trend_us500_m5
hypothesis: On US500 M5, during the NY cash session, pullbacks to EMA(20) within a higher-timeframe trend (EMA50>EMA200, ADX>20) and an RSI(14) dip-buy (or rip-sell) yield high-hit-rate continuation trades with PF>=2.0.

entry_rules.long: ema50 > ema200 AND close pulls back to within 0.25*ATR of ema20 AND rsi(14) crosses up through 45 AND in_session
entry_rules.short: ema50 < ema200 AND close pulls back to within 0.25*ATR of ema20 AND rsi(14) crosses down through 55 AND in_session

exit_rules.stop_loss: 1.2 * ATR(14) below swing low (long) / above swing high (short)
